name: InSight
fact: First dedicated planetary seismograph on Mars. Detected over 1,300 marsquakes including a record-breaking magnitude-5 quake in May 2022. Heat-flow probe (HP³) failed to penetrate the unexpectedly cohesive regolith. Mission ended December 2022 when dust accumulation on solar panels dropped power below operating threshold.
capability: First seismic exploration of another planet's interior — established Mars's core size and crustal thickness.
